title: Bitdeer April 2026 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitdeer mined 783 bitcoins in April 2026, representing a 372% year-over-year increase. The company's self-mining hash rate reached approximately 65.5 EH/s, while co-mining operations added 8.4 EH/s capacity. The company manages 297,000 total mining rigs globally and operates 3.0 GW of electrical capacity. Management noted April marked another month of disciplined execution across the integrated AI and Bitcoin mining platform. Bitdeer officially launched its SEALMINER A4 series with three variants: A4 Ultra Hydro, A4 Pro Hydro, and A4 Pro Air, featuring industry-leading energy efficiency of 9.45 J/TH. The AI cloud segment demonstrated strong momentum, with annualized recurring revenue reaching approximately $69 million, a 60% month-over-month increase. The company deployed 4,184 GPUs across H100, H200, B200, and GB200 architectures, maintaining a 92% utilization rate. Management highlighted that executing on colocation lease agreements is the top priority, with the Tydal, Norway facility in advanced negotiation stages with a prospective tenant.
